overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing an armored warrior character walking through a snowy mountain landscape toward a large traditional East Asian temple complex. The environment features snow-covered stone pathways, twisted dormant trees, and dramatic mountain peaks under an overcast winter sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: snow-covered mountain staircase with rocky walls

agents.ego_description: armored warrior character walking steadily up stone stairs toward the distant temple, staff weapon visible on back

entered.detail: large multi-tiered traditional temple with curved roofs visible in the mountain valley ahead
tall jagged mountain peak rising behind the temple complex
large ancient tree with gnarled bare branches covered in snow
steep snow-dusted rock face forming the left boundary of the path
weathered stone steps ascending through the snow-covered mountain terrain

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view following an armored warrior ascending a stone staircase through a snowy mountain pass. The path is flanked by a rocky wall on the left and twisted ancient trees on the right, with a magnificent traditional temple visible in the distant valley ahead beneath snow-capped peaks.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper mountain stairs approaching temple courtyard

events.description: character reaches the top of the steep stone staircase and transitions to flatter snow-covered ground

agents.ego_description: warrior continuing to climb the mountain path, passing large twisted trees as the temple grows larger in the frame

entered.detail: flat snow-covered terrain replacing the stone steps at the top of the ascent

segments.scene_description: The warrior continues ascending the mountain, reaching the top of the stone staircase and transitioning onto a snow-covered plateau. The temple complex looms larger ahead as the character passes ancient twisted trees, with the rocky wall falling away to reveal more of the open mountain vista.

scene_state.functional_zone: temple approach courtyard with snow-covered grounds

agents.ego_description: warrior walking across the open snow-covered courtyard directly toward the main temple entrance

entered.detail: ornate wooden gate structure with traditional roof tiles marking the temple entrance

segments.scene_description: In the final segment, the warrior crosses the open snow-covered courtyard approaching the temple's main gate. The massive temple structure now dominates the center of the frame, its dark wooden architecture and tiered roofs contrasting against the white snow and grey overcast sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as an armored warrior ascends a narrow mountain pass that gradually opens into a vast temple courtyard. It begins with the warrior climbing a stone staircase flanked by a rocky wall and twisted ancient trees, with a distant temple visible beneath snow-capped peaks. As the warrior reaches the top of the stairs, the scene expands onto a snow-covered plateau where the rocky wall falls away to reveal a wider mountain vista. The camera then follows the character across an open courtyard, allowing the massive temple structure to loom larger and eventually dominate the frame. Finally, the dark wooden architecture and tiered roofs of the main gate come into full view, contrasting sharply against the white snow and grey overcast sky.
